title: Delicate Slovakian Grape Leaves Dumplings
description: A traditional Slovakian dish featuring grape leaves and a cheese-pull filling, made kid-friendly and jain-friendly with nuka-pickle, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Rinse the grape leaves and blanch them in boiling water for 30 seconds to make them pliable
In a large bowl, mix together the nuka-pickle, tofu cheese, flour, water, salt, and black pepper to form a dough
Lay a grape leaf flat and place a tablespoon of the dough in the center of the leaf
Fold the stem end over the dough, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a tight cylinder
Repeat with the remaining grape leaves and dough
Place the dumplings in a large steamer basket and steam for 10 minutes
Serve the dumplings hot with a side of nuka-pickle sauce
